ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course (e.g., ME710) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., CAD/CAM) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course carries */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed to enroll in the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is elective or core */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being assessed */,
  "theory_score" INTEGER /* Score for the theoretical assessment */,
  "ia_score" INTEGER /* Score for internal assessment */,
  "term_work_score" INTEGER /* Score for term work */,
  "practical_score" INTEGER /* Score for practical work */,
  "oral_score" INTEGER /* Score for oral presentation */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., midterm, final, project) */,
  "weightage" INTEGER /* Weightage of the assessment in the final grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score obtained by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade assigned to the student */,
  "grade_point" INTEGER /* Grade point associated with the student's performance */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term in which the performance was recorded */,
  "attendance_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of attendance for the course */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Instructor's comments on the student's performance */,
  "is_makeup" INTEGER /* Indicates if the performance is a result of a makeup exam or assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the program */,
  "program" TEXT /* The program in which the student is enrolled */,
  "major" TEXT /* The major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* The minor of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "letter_grade" TEXT /* Letter grade assigned (e.g., A+, B) */,
  "grade_point" INTEGER /* Corresponding grade point value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade (e.g., 'Excellent', 'Good') */,
  "is_pass" INTEGER /* Indicates if the grade is a passing grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., Fall 2022) */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the term */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the faculty teaches */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term in which the course is offered */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)
